title: Ideaspace Note frontmatter (Layer 1)
description: The portable, author-owned frontmatter of a knowledge Note — what travels in the file (subject), as opposed to provenance (git) and platform identity (the map). PROVISIONAL, internal use, v0.1; public timing undecided. Per the spec, an absent field is a drift signal, not an error — nothing is strictly required. Additional fields are allowed so the leaf stays extensible.

summary.description: What this is about, compressed. Orients a reader without querying anything.

attached_to.description: A SINGLE typed link to the entity this Note is about (subject, not provenance). One value by design — the inverse fan-in (a thing having many Notes) is the graph's job, not the file's. The type prefix vocabulary is the open 'namespace' question; this enum is provisional and meant to grow.

tags.description: Flat classifiers within the directory model.

x-status: provisional — internal use; public timing undecided
x-notes: Subject rides in frontmatter (this schema); provenance (author, co-author, Change-Id) rides in git; internal handles (node_id) ride in the platform map, never the file.
Other fields (e.g. web_page source URL, generation cost) are permitted via additionalProperties but are not yet standardized here.
To extend the attach-type namespace, add the prefix to the pattern and x-provisional-types. Keep it a deliberate, versioned change.
